author: anon-b9326049
content: Committed c27d4a5b on fix/739-tui-string-placeholder. Five fixes in one commit: (1) build_config no longer emits the (text) placeholder for ConfigType::String keys; (2) populate_tracker_remote and read_tracker_remote auto-repair / fall-back on the corrupt value; (3) sync_cmd now publishes the hub branch when local is ahead — closes the multi-agent bootstrap race; (4) classifier picks up the four NonFastForward variants git emits for concurrent-ref-update races; (5) cpitd 0.3.0 schema alias. 8 new tests + 4 previously-failing smoke tests now pass. Full suite green, fmt clean, zero new clippy errors. Waiting on push to open the PR to develop.
